title: Log In
subtitle: Log in to your account and start tracking your appointments.
enterEmail: Enter your email address to receive a reset code.
enterCode: Enter the verification code sent to your email.
codeSent: Reset code has been sent to your email.
passwordReset: Password reset successful! Redirecting to login...
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters long
networkError: Cannot connect to the API. For local dev use the Vite proxy: set VITE_API_BASE_URL to /api, or run the backend on http://localhost:3000 with VITE_API_BASE_URL http://localhost:3000 (the app adds /api when needed). Production: use your full API base including /api.
